== Notes for [[Item:Q2522|Q2522]] ==

{geni:about_me} https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muwatalli_I
<p>Biography</p>
<p>Muwatalli killed his predecessor Huzziya II. He was the Chief of the Royal Bodyguard of Huzziya, but later he killed him. He may have been Huzziya's younger brother.</p>
<p>Muwatalli's Chief of the Royal Bodyguard was called Muwa. Muwattalli himself was killed in a palace by Himuili, the Chief of the Palace Servants, and Kantuzili, the Overseer of the Gold Chariot Fighters.[1] His wife was called Walanni.[2]


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
